info.title: xuedao API Contracts
info.description: Repository-level OpenAPI source of truth for xuedao admin APIs. Performance resources are synchronized from controller/service/types with richer TS-driven schemas; base, demo, dict, plugin, recycle, space, task and user resources are synchronized from the checked-in EPS snapshot and must still converge on this file.
